scripts.ci:local:quality: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --config.strictDepBuilds=false && pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend exec node -e "const Database=require('better-sqlite3'); const db=new Database('ci-verify.db'); db.prepare('select 1').get(); db.close(); console.log('better-sqlite3 ok')" && pnpm turbo run lint typecheck test --filter=@asterism/backend --filter=@asterism/frontend
scripts.ci:local:e2e: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --config.strictDepBuilds=false && pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend rebuild better-sqlite3 && pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend exec node -e "const Database=require('better-sqlite3'); const db=new Database('ci-verify.db'); db.prepare('select 1').get(); db.close(); console.log('better-sqlite3 ok')" && pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend exec playwright install chromium && rm -f apps/frontend/ci-users.db && BETTER_AUTH_DB_PATH=ci-users.db pnpm --filter @asterism/frontend test:e2e
